code: /** Parse optimization action analysis payloads for unified UI rendering. */import{evidenceOptimizationMetrics,optimizationDataQualityLabel,optimizationMetricStatusLabel}from'./evidenceUtils';import{tierLabel,tierTone}from'./scoreboardUtils';function parseJsonField(value,fallback){if(value==null)return fallback;if(typeof value==='object')return value;try{return JSON.parse(value);}catch(_unused){return fallback;}}export function parseActionAnalysis(action){var _action$overall_score;if(!action)return null;const cost=parseJsonField(action.cost_evidence,{});const utilization=parseJsonField(action.utilization_evidence,{});const rules=parseJsonField(action.decision_rules_applied,[]);const metricsBlock=utilization.optimization_metrics||{};const metrics=evidenceOptimizationMetrics({optimization_metrics:metricsBlock});return{cost,utilization,rules:Array.isArray(rules)?rules:[],metrics,tier:action.recommendation_tier||cost.recommendation_tier,overallScore:(_action$overall_score=action.overall_score)!==null&&_action$overall_score!==void 0?_action$overall_score:cost.overall_score,dimensions:utilization.dimensions||{},workload:utilization.workload||{},performanceRiskScore:utilization.performance_risk_score,dependencyBlastRadius:utilization.dependency_blast_radius,implementationEffort:cost.implementation_effort,automationAvailable:cost.automation_available,dataQuality:metricsBlock.data_quality};}export{tierLabel,tierTone,optimizationDataQualityLabel,optimizationMetricStatusLabel};
